kept.text:
Day 84 of learning how to script on Roblox! 👀✨

Since I still haven't finished BrawlDev's advanced scripting series (I've been testing out my own challenges), I went back today and learned about Haptic Service which are controller vibrations! 

I thought this was super cool even though I don't have a controller to test this out on since it's already packed in moving boxes 🫣 

There was a challenge at the end of the video to create your own speed haptic script. I was able to figure it out and do it on my own, however his result was way more optimized so I adjusted mine to match his 😅 overall though this was pretty simple to learn!
